name: io.github.MichielDeRuiter/sandboxapi-mcp
title: SandboxAPI
description: Execute code in 8 languages (Python, JS, TS, Go, Java, C++, C, Bash) in gVisor sandboxes.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for MCP endpoint authentication

tools.name: execute_code
tools.description: Execute code in a sandboxed container. Supports Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Bash, Java, C++, C, and Go.

tools.name: execute_batch
tools.description: Execute multiple code snippets in sandboxed containers. Each execution runs independently.

tools.name: list_languages
tools.description: List all supported programming languages with their versions and examples.
